content: Post-release music checklist table stakes: pitch to playlist curators (SubmitHub, Groover, Playlist Push), copyright filing within 3-month window (SR form, copyright.gov), PRO and SoundExchange registration, social media sustained posting (2-3x/week for 4+ weeks), mailing list announcement, Spotify for Artists Canvas and Clips upload, pin release to Spotify profile. Key insight: 75% of a release's first-year streams happen after month one. Spotify Discover Weekly window is 1-4 weeks post-release and rewards high save-to-stream ratio. Post-release content is more important than pre-release hype for algorithmic traction.
